text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My days of training with Yaeno Muteki are well
underway. One day, we run into one of her
classmates on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is a diligent runner gaining
popularity for her recent victories. It seems her
role model, Maruzensky, has also taken her under
her wing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We next come across Mejiro Ardan at the gym.
The amount of training she can do is limited due
to her poor constitution, but she does all she can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of her classmates working so hard lights
a fire in Yaeno Muteki, who's determined to not
be outdone by either of them.
